query.statment: CREATE TABLE Employee_dates ( DATE_ID VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL , EMP_ID VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL , WORKING_DATE DATE , DATE_TYPE_ID varchar(50) , OPTION1 VARCHAR2(50) , OPTION2 VARCHAR2(50) , OPTION3 VARCHAR2(50) )
CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEE_TYPE ( "ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "AR_TITLE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EN_TITLE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TYPE_CODE_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE))
CREATE TABLE HR_TYPE_CODE ( "CODE_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "CODE_NAME" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) )

CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEE ( "EMP_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, "EMP_NO" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "EMP_NAME" VARCHAR2(255 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "ADDRESS" VARCHAR2(255 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "DESIGNATION" VARCHAR2(255 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "WORK_PHONE" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "EXTENSION" VARCHAR2(10 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "HOME_PHONE" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "FAX" VARCHAR2(15 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "EMAIL" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "DEPARTMENT" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) DEFAULT 0, "HOURE_SALARY" NUMBER(10,2), "OVER_TIME1" NUMBER(10,2), "OVER_TIME2" NUMBER(10,2), "OVER_TIME3" NUMBER(10,2), "IS_ACTIVE" NUMBER(1,0) DEFAULT 0, "NOTE" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), "CREATION_TIME" DATE, "CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "GENDER" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "MARITAL_STATUS" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "EDUCATION" VARCHAR2(500 BYTE), "OPTION_1" VARCHAR2(250 BYTE), "OPTION_2" VARCHAR2(250 BYTE), "OPTION_3" VARCHAR2(250 BYTE), "SOCIAL_NUMBER" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "POSITION" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "WORK_START_DATE" DATE, "MELATRY_STATUS" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "INSURANCE_NUMBER" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "BIRTH_DATE" DATE)

CREATE TABLE "EMPLOYEE_REQUESTS" ( "ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EMP_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "REQ_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "FROM_DATE" TIMESTAMP (6), "TO_DATE" TIMESTAMP (6), "REQ_AMOUNT" FLOAT, "REQ_TYPE" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), "NOTE" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), "CREATION_TIME" TIMESTAMP (6), "CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION1" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), "OPTION2" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), "OPTION3" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) )
INSERT INTO STATUS_TYPE (ID, CASE_EN, CASE_AR, BUSINESS_TYPE) VALUES ('68', 'requested', 'مطلوب', 'empReq');
INSERT INTO BUSINESS_OBJECT_TYPE (ID,NAME,DESCRIPTION) values ('9','Employee Requests',null)
INSERT INTO STATUS_TYPE (ID, CASE_EN, CASE_AR, BUSINESS_TYPE) VALUES ('69', 'accepted', 'مقبول', 'empReq');
INSERT INTO STATUS_TYPE (ID, CASE_EN, CASE_AR, BUSINESS_TYPE) VALUES ('70', 'rejected', 'مرفوض', 'empReq');
INSERT INTO STATUS_TYPE (ID, CASE_EN, CASE_AR, BUSINESS_TYPE) VALUES ('71', 'canceled', 'ألغي', 'empReq');

CREATE TABLE "EMPLOYEE_PROFILE" ( "ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EMP_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "DEPT_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "VACATIONS" Int, "TEMP_VACATIONS" Int, "TEMP_LEAVE" Int, "WORKING_HOURS" Int, "WORK_TYPE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "SALARY" FLOAT(126), "CREATION_TIME" TIMESTAMP (6), "CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION1" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION2" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION3" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CONSTRAINT "EMPLOYEE_PROFILE_UK1" UNIQUE ("EMP_ID", "DEPT_ID") );

Insert into PROJECT (PROJECT_ID,PROJECT_NAME,EQ_NO,CREATION_TIME,CREATED_BY,PROJECT_DESCRIPTION,MAIN_PROJ_ID,LOCATION_TYPE,FUTILE,COORDINATE,OPTION_ONE,OPTION_TWO,OPTION_THREE,IS_TRNSPRT_STN,IS_MNGMNT_STN,INTEGRATED_ID,NEW_CODE,PROJECTFLAG) values ('1522671400800','Employees Requests','AERQ',to_date('02-APR-18','DD-MON-RR'),'1','Employees Requests','0','VG','1','UL','UL','1','0','0','0',null,null,'1');

Insert into PROJECT (PROJECT_ID,PROJECT_NAME,EQ_NO,CREATION_TIME,CREATED_BY,PROJECT_DESCRIPTION,MAIN_PROJ_ID,LOCATION_TYPE,FUTILE,COORDINATE,OPTION_ONE,OPTION_TWO,OPTION_THREE,IS_TRNSPRT_STN,IS_MNGMNT_STN,INTEGRATED_ID,NEW_CODE,PROJECTFLAG) values ('1523780445717','درجات الموظفين','EMPCLAS',to_date('15-APR-18','DD-MON-RR'),'1','درجات الموظفين','0','VG','1','UL','UL','1','0','0','0',null,null,'1');

CREATE TABLE "PCRM"."EMPLOYEE_FINANCE" ("ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "EMP_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "EXPENSE_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "YEAR" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "MONTH" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "BASIC" FLOAT(126), "CURRENT_FINANCE" FLOAT(126), CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CREATION_TIME DATE , OPTION_1 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_2 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_3 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) )

CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEE_TRANSACTION ( TRANS_ID VARCHAR2(50) , EMP_ID VARCHAR2(50) , BUSINESS_ID VARCHAR2(50) , ISSUE_STATUS_ID VARCHAR(50) , BUSINESS_TYPE VARCHAR(50) , DEBIT FLOAT , CREDIT FLOAT , INITIAL_VALUE FLOAT , CREATION_TIME DATE , CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(20) , OPTION_1 VARCHAR2(50) , OPTION_2 VARCHAR2(50) , OPTION_3 VARCHAR2(50) )

CREATE TABLE EMP_SALARY_CONFIG ( ID VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, EMP_ID VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), EXPENSE_ID VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CREATION_TIME DATE, CREATION_BY VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CONFIG_VALUE NUMBER, CONFIG_PERSENTAGE VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CONFIG_TYPE VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_1 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_2 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_3 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_4 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CONSTRAINT "EMP_SALARY_CONFIG_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ID"), CONSTRAINT "EMP_EXPENSE_DATE_UK" UNIQUE ("EMP_ID", "EXPENSE_ID", "CREATION_TIME") )
